evaluations.name: Stratton Office Supply — Freight Discrepancy

inputs.invoiceData: "{   ""document_type"": ""invoice"",   ""vendor"": ""Stratton Office Supply Co."",   ""invoice_number"": ""SOS-2026-3389"",   ""invoice_date"": ""2026-05-20"",   ""due_date"": ""2026-06-19"",   ""customer_po"": ""PO-2026-10872"",   ""payment_terms"": ""Net 30"",   ""currency"": ""USD"",   ""bill_to"": ""Customer Accounts Payable"",   ""remit_to"": ""445 Industrial Blvd, Austin, TX 78744"",   ""vendor_contact"": {     ""address"": ""445 Industrial Blvd, Austin, TX 78744"",     ""phone"": ""(512) 555-0148"",     ""email"": ""ar@strattonoffice.com""   },   ""line_items"": [     {       ""description"": ""Dell Latitude 7440 - 14\"" laptop, i7, 16GB RAM, 512GB SSD"",       ""sku"": ""LAPTOP-DELL-7440"",       ""qty"": 3,       ""unit_price"": 1450.00,       ""amount"": 4350.00     },     {       ""description"": ""Dell UltraSharp U2723QE 27\"" 4K monitor"",       ""sku"": ""MON-DELL-U2723"",       ""qty"": 3,       ""unit_price"": 620.00,       ""amount"": 1860.00     },     {       ""description"": ""Dell Thunderbolt Dock WD22TB4"",       ""sku"": ""DOCK-WD22TB4"",       ""qty"": 3,       ""unit_price"": 320.00,       ""amount"": 960.00     }   ],   ""subtotal"": 7170.00,   ""tax"": 573.60,   ""freight"": 150.00,   ""total"": 7893.60 }"
inputs.poData: "{   ""document_type"": ""purchase_order"",   ""buyer"": ""Acme Procurement"",   ""po_number"": ""PO-2026-10872"",   ""po_date"": ""2026-04-30"",   ""payment_terms"": ""Net 30"",   ""currency"": ""USD"",   ""status"": ""Issued"",   ""vendor"": ""Stratton Office Supply Co."",   ""ship_to"": ""Acme Procurement Receiving Dock, 1100 Commerce Plaza, Chicago IL 60606"",   ""instructions"": ""Reference PO number PO-2026-10872 on all shipping documents and invoices. Send invoices to ap@acmeprocurement.com."",   ""line_items"": [     {       ""description"": ""Dell Latitude 7440 - 14\"" laptop, i7, 16GB RAM, 512GB SSD"",       ""sku"": ""LAPTOP-DELL-7440"",       ""qty"": 3,       ""unit_price"": 1450.00,       ""extended"": 4350.00     },     {       ""description"": ""Dell UltraSharp U2723QE 27\"" 4K monitor"",       ""sku"": ""MON-DELL-U2723"",       ""qty"": 3,       ""unit_price"": 620.00,       ""extended"": 1860.00     },     {       ""description"": ""Dell Thunderbolt Dock WD22TB4"",       ""sku"": ""DOCK-WD22TB4"",       ""qty"": 3,       ""unit_price"": 320.00,       ""extended"": 960.00     }   ],   ""subtotal"": 7170.00,   ""tax"": 573.60,   ""total"": 7743.60 }"

discrepancies.explanation: Invoice includes $150.00 freight but the PO total equals subtotal + tax with no freight amount included, indicating freight was not authorized on the PO and creates the entire total mismatch.
discrepancies.evidence: Step-by-step arithmetic: Invoice total 7893.60 = subtotal 7170.00 + tax 573.60 + freight 150.00. PO total 7743.60 = subtotal 7170.00 + tax 573.60, so implied PO freight = 0.00. Delta = 150.00.

discrepancies.explanation: Invoice total exceeds PO total by $150.00, driven by the additional freight charge on the invoice.

evaluations.expectedAgentBehavior: Agent must call the vendor_contracts tool after detecting the freight discrepancy, searching for any contract clause that authorizes the $150.00 freight charge before reaching a recommendation. Agent should escalate after finding no authorizing clause.

evaluations.name: Perfect Match- Stratton Office Supply

inputs.invoiceData: {"document_type": "invoice", "vendor": "Stratton Office Supply Co.", "invoice_number": "SOS-2026-4412", "invoice_date": "2026-06-01", "due_date": "2026-07-01", "customer_po": "PO-2026-14880", "payment_terms": "Net 30", "currency": "USD", "bill_to": "Customer Accounts Payable", "remit_to": "445 Industrial Blvd, Austin, TX 78744", "line_items": [{"description": "HP Office Pro Ink Cartridge 4-pack", "sku": "INK-HP-8034E", "qty": 10, "unit_price": 42.0, "amount": 420.0}, {"description": "Hammermill Premium Copy Paper 500-sheet ream", "sku": "PAPER-HM-500", "qty": 20, "unit_price": 12.5, "amount": 250.0}], "subtotal": 670.0, "tax": 53.6, "freight": 0.0, "total": 723.6}
inputs.poData: {"document_type": "purchase_order", "buyer": "Acme Procurement", "po_number": "PO-2026-14880", "po_date": "2026-05-15", "payment_terms": "Net 30", "currency": "USD", "status": "Issued", "vendor": "Stratton Office Supply Co.", "ship_to": "Acme Procurement Receiving Dock, 1100 Commerce Plaza, Chicago IL 60606", "line_items": [{"description": "HP Office Pro Ink Cartridge 4-pack", "sku": "INK-HP-8034E", "qty": 10, "unit_price": 42.0, "extended": 420.0}, {"description": "Hammermill Premium Copy Paper 500-sheet ream", "sku": "PAPER-HM-500", "qty": 20, "unit_price": 12.5, "extended": 250.0}], "subtotal": 670.0, "tax": 53.6, "total": 723.6}

expectedOutput.reasoning: Invoice and purchase order match exactly on all fields. Vendor name, all line items, quantities, unit prices, tax, freight, and totals are identical. No discrepancies found; payment may proceed.

evaluations.expectedAgentBehavior: If there is no discrepancies, there should be no agent run history because no tool calls were required and everything can be handled within the LLM. If a discrepancy is found, then Agent must call the vendor_contracts to validate findings.

evaluations.name: Unit Price Discrepancy - Meridian Tech Supplies

inputs.invoiceData: {"document_type": "invoice", "vendor": "Meridian Tech Supplies", "invoice_number": "MTS-2026-0892", "invoice_date": "2026-06-03", "due_date": "2026-07-03", "customer_po": "PO-2026-12045", "payment_terms": "Net 30", "currency": "USD", "bill_to": "Customer Accounts Payable", "remit_to": "7200 Technology Park Dr, Austin, TX 78758", "line_items": [{"description": "1TB NVMe SSD, PCIe Gen4", "sku": "SSD-1TB-NVME-G4", "qty": 5, "unit_price": 195.0, "amount": 975.0}, {"description": "USB-C Cable 6ft", "sku": "USBC-6FT", "qty": 10, "unit_price": 18.0, "amount": 180.0}], "subtotal": 1155.0, "tax": 92.4, "freight": 0.0, "total": 1247.4}
inputs.poData: {"document_type": "purchase_order", "buyer": "Acme Procurement", "po_number": "PO-2026-12045", "po_date": "2026-05-20", "payment_terms": "Net 30", "currency": "USD", "status": "Issued", "vendor": "Meridian Tech Supplies", "ship_to": "Acme Procurement Receiving Dock, 1100 Commerce Plaza, Chicago IL 60606", "line_items": [{"description": "1TB NVMe SSD, PCIe Gen4", "sku": "SSD-1TB-NVME-G4", "qty": 5, "unit_price": 175.0, "extended": 875.0}, {"description": "USB-C Cable 6ft", "sku": "USBC-6FT", "qty": 10, "unit_price": 18.0, "extended": 180.0}], "subtotal": 1055.0, "tax": 84.4, "total": 1139.4}

discrepancies.explanation: Invoice unit price for SSD-1TB-NVME-G4 is $195.00 vs PO price of $175.00, a $20.00 per-unit variance across 5 units totaling $100.00.
discrepancies.evidence: Direct field comparison: invoice unit_price 195.00 vs PO unit_price 175.00. vendor_contracts search found no clause authorizing this price increase for Meridian Tech Supplies.

discrepancies.explanation: Invoice total exceeds PO total by $108.00, driven by the unit price variance on the SSD line item and its tax impact.

expectedOutput.reasoning: Invoice unit price for SSD-1TB-NVME-G4 is $195.00 vs the PO price of $175.00, creating a $100.00 line-level variance and a total amount delta of $108.00. Vendor contracts search returned no contract clause for Meridian Tech Supplies authorizing this price increase. Escalation is required for human review.

evaluations.expectedAgentBehavior: Agent must call the vendor_contracts tool after detecting the unit price discrepancy on the SSD-1TB-NVME-G4 line item, searching for any contract clause that authorizes the higher price before reaching a recommendation.
